No executable logic, no external data processing, no network calls beyond standard blockchain interactions.  \n- **Malware & Obfuscation:** All reports agree on zero malware and obfuscation scores.  \n- **Risk Scores:** The only minor discrepancy is Report 4's risk score of 0.1, which seems overly cautious given the evidence.
